title: Detect injection vulnerabilities in code sample
description: Given a code sample with SQL injection and XSS vulnerabilities, the skill should identify both, classify them under the correct OWASP categories, and provide remediation.

assertions.description: Must identify SQL injection from string concatenation in query
Must identify reflected XSS from unsanitized user input in HTML response
Must reference the OWASP Injection category (A03:2025)
Must recommend parameterized queries as SQL injection remediation
Must recommend output encoding or sanitization for XSS remediation

title: Generate a threat model for an authentication service
description: Given a description of an authentication microservice, the skill should produce a threat model covering STRIDE categories, trust boundaries, and risk ratings.
prompt:
Build a threat model for the following service:

An authentication microservice that accepts username/password via REST API, validates against a PostgreSQL database, issues JWT tokens, supports OAuth2 with Google and GitHub, exposes a /reset-password endpoint that sends email via SendGrid, and runs in a Kubernetes pod with a public-facing ingress.

assertions.description: Must use STRIDE or enumerate STRIDE threat categories
Must identify trust boundaries between external clients, ingress, and internal services
Must analyze JWT token security (signing, expiry, storage)
Must identify password reset flow as a threat vector
Must assign risk or severity ratings to identified threats
